perm_storage_desc.message: Required to save your settings and feature preferences locally.

perm_activeTab_desc.message: Required to run scripts on the current tab when you activate the extension.

perm_scripting_desc.message: Required to inject content scripts into web pages.

perm_tabs_desc.message: Required to read tab information and URLs.

feature_example_desc.message: A sample feature to demonstrate the system.
